mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscriptions ( id, organization_id, payment_provider, payment_id, customer_id, status, current_period_start, current_period_end, trial_end, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{paymentProvider}, #{paymentId}, #{customerId}, #{status, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.SubscriptionStatusTypeHandler}, #{currentPeriodStart}, #{currentPeriodEnd}, #{trialEnd}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, organization_id, payment_provider, payment_id, customer_id, status, current_period_start, current_period_end, trial_end, created_at, updated_at FROM subscriptions WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}

SELECT id, organization_id, payment_provider, payment_id, customer_id, status, current_period_start, current_period_end, trial_end, created_at, updated_at FROM subscriptions WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.update: UPDATE subscriptions SET payment_provider = #{paymentProvider}, payment_id = #{paymentId}, customer_id = #{customerId}, status = #{status, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.SubscriptionStatusTypeHandler}, current_period_start = #{currentPeriodStart}, current_period_end = #{currentPeriodEnd}, trial_end = #{trialEnd}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM subscriptions WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
